description: Creates a point using polar coordinates (radius and angle in degrees) on a 2D graph, optionally relative to a specified center point.
utility: Place a point at polar coordinates (radius, angle) on a graph

arguments.name: center
arguments.description: Optional center point as a tuple for relative polar coordinates

alternates.description: Point at polar coordinates (radius, angle in degrees) from origin
Point at polar coordinates relative to a center point

examples.scenario: Point at radius 5, angle 45 degrees from origin
Point at radius 3, angle 90 degrees from center (1,2)
